---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused RepoLens improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What developer problem would this feature solve?

## Proposed solution

What should RepoLens do?

## Scope

Is this small enough for the CLI-first v0.x roadmap?

## Alternatives considered

Are there simpler ways to solve this?

## Constraints

For v0.1, RepoLens is intentionally not adding Web UI, database, full AST engine, or autonomous agent loop features.
